title: notodanthonia carphoides var. angustior
intro: Notodanthonia carphoides var. angustior is a variety of the Notodanthonia carphoides plant, which is a type of grass native to Australia. The plant has been reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as a treatment for various skin irritations and infections, as well as being used to treat fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Notodanthonia carphoides var. angustior include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote healing in wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which can be applied topically to affected areas to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
